Package application.controller

Class PlacementController

java.lang.Object
application.controller.PlacementController
public class PlacementController extends Object
Singleton controller responsible for managing the logic behind placing, rotating, and dragging tiles/movers within the game grid.

It interprets mouse input events and translates them into inventory updates and visual placement previews.

  • Field Details

    • INSTANCE

      public static final PlacementController INSTANCE
      The singleton instance of the PlacementController.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlacementController

      public PlacementController()

  • Method Details

    • rotateCurrentRotation

      public void rotateCurrentRotation()
      Cycles the current placement rotation to the next clockwise direction. Triggers a UI refresh for the inventory and updates the current placement preview.

    • handleTileSelectChange

      public void handleTileSelectChange(TileSelectChangeEvent event)
      Updates the controller state when a new tile type is selected from the UI. * @param event The event containing the new tile's name, factory, and default rotation.

    • handleOnMouseMove

      public void handleOnMouseMove(GridPos pos)
      Updates the current tracking position of the mouse on the grid. Resets the drag starting point to the current position. * @param pos The current grid coordinates of the mouse.

    • handleOnMouseExit

      public void handleOnMouseExit(GridPos pos)
      Cleans up the placement preview and refreshes the visual state of the tile and its neighbors when the mouse leaves a grid cell. * @param pos The grid position being exited.

    • handleMousePressed

      public void handleMousePressed(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event, GridPos gridPos)
      Handles the initial mouse press.
      • Secondary Button: Rotates an existing mover on the grid or the current selection.
      • Other Buttons: Initializes the dragging logic for path placement.
      * @param event The JavaFX MouseEvent triggered.
      Parameters:
      gridPos - The grid position where the press occurred.

    • handleMouseDragged

      public void handleMouseDragged(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event, GridPos gridPos)
      Updates the placement path as the user drags the mouse across the grid. Only processes logic if the Primary Mouse Button is active. * @param event The drag event.
      Parameters:
      gridPos - The current grid position under the cursor during the drag.

    • handleMouseReleased

      public void handleMouseReleased(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event, GridPos gridPos)
      Finalizes the placement or removal of tiles based on the generated placementList. Plays corresponding sound effects based on success or failure of the action. * @param event The release event.
      Parameters:
      gridPos - The grid position where the mouse was released.

    • getRotation

      public Direction getRotation()
      Gets the current rotation direction set for placement. * @return The current Direction.
